Name: the Beroski Family
Description:
Equipment Rating: Average (Mercenaries)

Perhaps the best known criminal organization ever, the Mafia of the thirty-first century traces its roots back to the original crime families from twentieth-century Terra. Found throughout human-occupied space, with higher concentrations within the Free Worlds League, Lyran Commonwealth and Federated Suns, the Mafia is no longer restricted to men of Italian heritage but accepts all into its ranks who are willing to protect "the Family." The criminal activities it engages in are just as varied, from drug trafficking and prostitution to racketeering and smuggling.

Reputation with the criminal underworld isn't about cordial relations. After all, such organisations are often in conflict. Rather, it represents a Mercenary Company's criminal street cred, or conversely their actions acting as the various Houses police force.
ReputationStatements: You’ve got a rough reputation. Normally that’d concern me. Today it saves me time.
Try not to embarrass us out there. The Family’s name matters.
Some people forgot to pay what they owe. We need a reminder delivered.
The Family believes in cooperation. Those who refuse cooperation usually regret it.
Most mercs think short-term. You understand relationships. That’s smart.
You handle business professionally. Makes my job a lot easier.
You’ve done good work for the Family before. That kind of reliability gets remembered.
MissionSuccessStatements: You handled that with style. The Family appreciates style.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: Could’ve gone better, sure. Could’ve gone a whole lot worse, too. The Family respects effort, especially under bad conditions.
BadFaithFailureStatements: You walked away while Family business was still unfinished. That reflects poorly on you.
